HavenRise Realtors — Luxury Real Estate in Nairobi, Kenya

HavenRise Realtors is Nairobi's premier luxury real estate agency, specialising in exclusive off-plan and ready properties across Lavington, Westlands, Kilimani, Riverside, Runda and Kiambu. Properties from KES 6,900,000 with flexible payment plans.

📞 +254 728 686 089  |  ✉ havenriserealtors@gmail.com  |  📍 Ciata City Mall, Ridgeways, Block B, 2nd Floor, Nairobi

  • A-One Pandora — Lavington luxury apartments, from KES 6.9M
  • Panorama West Residence — Westlands apartments
  • Balkis Residences Riverside — premium riverside apartments
  • Amethyst Springs — Kilimani luxury apartments
  • Lesto Residences — Westlands contemporary apartments

Houses & Villas for Rent — Nairobi

  • 5-bedroom house for rent — Runda, Nairobi
  • 7-bedroom Runda Acacia residence for rent
  • 4-bedroom gated home — Kiambu Road

Strategic Partnerships

Developers &
Land Partnerships

We bridge land, capital, and development expertise — structuring partnerships that unlock maximum value across Nairobi's prime real estate opportunities.

Start a Partnership How It Works

Scroll

12+

Active Developments

KES 4B+

Development Value

85%

Partner Retention

48hrs

Response Time

Who We Work With

Four Types of
Partnership

Whether you bring land, capital, expertise, or all three — there is a structured model designed for you.

01

Land Owners

Own undeveloped land in Nairobi or surrounds? We connect you with vetted developers, conduct fair valuations, and structure Joint Venture arrangements that unlock your land's full potential without giving it away.

02

Property Developers

Building residential estates, mixed-use schemes, or commercial projects? We provide off-plan sales management, market intelligence, and direct access to our database of qualified buyers and investors.

03

Real Estate Investors

Seeking co-development, joint venture, or bulk acquisition opportunities? We identify prime targets, lead due diligence, and structure deals that generate strong, long-term compounding returns.

04

Institutional Partners

Banks, SACCOs, and funds seeking real estate exposure: we offer structured advisory, portfolio co-investment, and exclusive access to off-market transactions in Nairobi's prime submarkets.

"The right partnership turns idle land into lasting legacy — and we know how to build both."

— HavenRise Development Team

Our Process

From First Call
to First Shovel

01

Initial Consultation

We meet to understand your land, capital, and goals. Honest and obligation-free.

02

Feasibility & Valuation

Market analysis and land valuation to identify the highest-value use of your asset.

03

Partner Matching

We tap our network to find the right developer, investor, or buyer fit.

04

Deal Structuring

Term negotiations, legal structuring, and due diligence support throughout.

05

Sales & Delivery

Off-plan sales programme, marketing, and project oversight through handover.

What We Bring

Our Value to
Every Deal

"We don't just broker deals — we architect outcomes that create compounding value for every party involved."

Speak to Our Team
01

Market Intelligence

Deep knowledge of Nairobi's micro-markets, zoning laws, and development pipeline.

02

Qualified Buyer Access

Immediate reach to 1,000+ active buyers, investors, and off-plan purchasers.

03

Legal Coordination

Title verification and transaction security via top property law firms.

04

Sales & Marketing

Photography, digital campaigns, show-unit management, and open days.

05

Project Management

Timeline oversight, contractor liaison, and milestone progress reporting.
